title: Step aside Tesla, BYD: Japanese carmakers deepen their hold on India's auto market with hybrids
summary_full: In the world's third-largest auto market, demand for hybrid cars is racing ahead of EVs, deepening the hold of Japanese carmakers in India.
summary_public: In the world's third-largest auto market, demand for hybrid cars is racing ahead of EVs, deepening the hold of Japanese carmakers in India.
